overarching_purpose: Genesis of the Business Infinity MVP

action_steps.logic: Identify the one 'Remarkable' feature of the Business Infinity substrate that makes it worth talking about (The Resonance Audit).
Review the Architect agent's UI proposals to ensure they align with semantic purity rather than generic 'Bootstrap' aesthetics.
Design the feedback loop so it fosters a 'tribe of one' relationship between the Founder and the Boardroom agents.
